metadata.description: Taste-first Research Operating System — 3 generator + 3 discipline commands, four generative axes (schools · types · frames · operators), one asymmetric-authority invariant, an anti-accretion rule, and the Arbor idea tree.

plugins.name: research-os
plugins.description: 6 research commands: the generator (/prospect, /forge, /autopsy) and the discipline moments (/prereg seals the evidence contract, /exp-verify checks the run is real, /adversary adjudicates the claim). Four generative axes de-monoculture the generator; one invariant (proposer = DOWN verdicts only; CLAIM_STANDS = independent; contribution = human) keeps it honest; a fixed parts budget keeps it converged. Installs commands + skills + the bundled arbor mcp idea tree.
